name: Vitess
description: Cloud-native MySQL sharding middleware for horizontal scaling, originally developed at YouTube, now a CNCF graduated project

license.comment: Fully open source under Apache 2.0 license.

hosting-options.comment: Self-hosted via Kubernetes Operator. PlanetScale provides managed Vitess service with branching workflows and enterprise features.

initial-release.comment: Repository created June 2013. Originally developed at YouTube starting 2011. Open-sourced and became CNCF graduated project in 2019.

primary-language.comment: Server code is entirely written in Go (golang). Relies on MySQL for storage engine.

data-model.comment: Relational data model. Acts as sharding middleware over MySQL databases.

topology.comment: Each shard contains one MySQL primary and multiple replicas. Leader-follower per shard with asynchronous replication.

sharding.comment: Supports hash and range-based sharding via Vindexes (sharding indexes). Automatic resharding via MoveTables and Reshard workflows. Manual shard selection also supported.

replication-factor.comment: Uses MySQL native asynchronous replication. Typical setup has 1 primary + multiple replicas per shard across availability zones.

multi-region.comment: Supports multi-region via 'cells' concept. Each cell represents a failure domain (e.g., AWS region). Cross-region deployments supported.

cap-position.comment: Relies on MySQL's asynchronous replication. Prioritizes availability. Replica reads may be stale depending on replication lag.

consistency-model.comment: Strong consistency on PRIMARY reads/writes within single shard. Eventual consistency on REPLICA reads. Configurable per-query routing.

acid-transactions.comment: Full ACID for single-shard transactions. Cross-shard transactions support best-effort or 2PC mode (slower, no isolation guarantee).

transaction-scope.comment: Single-shard transactions are fully ACID. Cross-shard available in MULTI (best-effort) or TWOPC modes. 2PC guarantees atomicity but not isolation.

isolation-levels.comment: PRIMARY reads use READ_COMMITTED. Single-shard transactions provide REPEATABLE_READ. Cross-shard lacks isolation guarantees.

distributed-transactions.comment: Two-Phase Commit (2PC) mode provides atomic cross-shard transactions. Performance overhead is significant (~10x slower). Recommended to design schema to avoid cross-shard transactions.

sql-compatibility.comment: MySQL wire protocol compatible. Most MySQL drivers work. Some features have limitations in sharded mode (documented incompatibilities).

secondary-indexes.comment: Secondary Vindexes provide cross-shard indexing. Allows WHERE clauses on non-sharding keys. Can be functional or lookup-based.

joins.comment: VTGate supports distributed JOINs. Inner joins and left joins supported. Cross-shard joins executed at VTGate layer when needed.

aggregations.comment: Full aggregation support. Vitess splits into local (pushed to MySQL) and global (aggregated at VTGate) operations. Optimized query planning.

full-text-search.comment: Uses MySQL's built-in full-text search capabilities. Available on underlying MySQL instances.

max-cluster-size.comment: YouTube ran Vitess with tens of thousands of MySQL nodes. Slack and other large deployments also run thousands of shards. No documented hard limit.

write-throughput.value: Scales linearly with shards (YouTube: tens of thousands of nodes)
write-throughput.comment: Performance scales with number of shards. YouTube ran tens of thousands of MySQL nodes. Slack handles 25k writes/sec on some tables.

read-latency-p99.comment: Each network hop adds ~1ms. Approximately 2ms additional latency over direct MySQL access. Official benchmarks at benchmark.vitess.io.

auto-scaling.comment: Resharding requires manual initiation via VReplication workflows (MoveTables, Reshard). Zero-downtime resharding but not automatic.

hot-spot-handling.comment: Supports horizontal and vertical splits via Reshard and MoveTables. Resharding is operator-initiated, not automatic.

zero-downtime-upgrades.comment: Vitess Operator supports planned rollouts with automatic failover before instance shutdown. Minimal downtime during traffic switching.

online-schema-changes.comment: Integrated with pt-online-schema-change and gh-ost. Background schema changes with atomic cutover. Command-line interface for migration management.

point-in-time-recovery.comment: Supports PITR via incremental backup and binlog replay. Restore to specific timestamp or GTID position. Uses SNAPSHOT keyspaces for recovery.

backup-strategy.comment: Full snapshots plus incremental backups via MySQL binary logs. Supports restore to arbitrary point in time.

kubernetes-operator.comment: PlanetScale maintains the official Vitess Operator for Kubernetes. Supports zero-downtime resharding, failover, and planned rollouts.

rust-driver.comment: Uses MySQL-compatible Rust drivers via MySQL wire protocol. No Vitess-specific Rust driver.

go-driver.comment: Official vitessdriver package provides Go database/sql driver. Connects to VTGate using gRPC or MySQL protocol.

java-driver.comment: Official Java client using gRPC. Standard MySQL JDBC drivers also work via MySQL wire protocol.

dotnet-driver.comment: Uses MySQL Connector/NET via MySQL wire protocol compatibility.

python-driver.comment: Official Python client library. MySQL-compatible drivers also work via wire protocol.

ruby-driver.comment: Uses mysql2 gem via MySQL wire protocol compatibility.

c-cpp-driver.comment: Uses MySQL Connector/C++ via MySQL wire protocol compatibility.

orm-support.comment: Major MySQL-compatible ORMs work via MySQL wire protocol. Some query patterns may need adjustment for sharded mode.

open-source.comment: Fully open source under Apache 2.0 license. CNCF graduated project since 2019.

free-tier.comment: PlanetScale paid plans start at $39/month. No free tier for Vitess-based offering (PostgreSQL offering has different pricing).

pricing-model.comment: PlanetScale uses resource-based pricing (storage + compute). Enterprise and Managed plans have custom pricing.

cost-estimate-small.value: PlanetScale starts at $39/month; self-hosted is infrastructure-only
cost-estimate-small.comment: PlanetScale Starter at $39/month. Self-hosted costs depend on infrastructure. Enterprise/Managed plans are custom.

github-stars.comment: As of December 2024. CNCF graduated project.

stackoverflow-tags.comment: Limited Stack Overflow presence. Community primarily uses Vitess Slack and GitHub issues.

change-data-capture.comment: VStream API provides built-in CDC via gRPC. Used by Debezium Vitess connector. Handles resharding automatically.

watch-subscribe.comment: VStream allows clients to subscribe to change events. Supports copying current state then streaming new changes.

triggers.comment: MySQL triggers are supported on underlying MySQL instances. Standard MySQL trigger functionality available.

event-streaming.comment: Debezium Vitess Connector streams changes to Kafka. Developed with Slack. Supports automatic reshard handling.
